text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm watching some Umamusume train, when...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Blue skies, a nice breeze... It's going to
be a great day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I could run forever! Wherever the wind
takes me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Really now? I was wondering who was making all
that noise, but to think it was you, Fine.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah! Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We're supposed to be training. Where do you
think you're going?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Well, if you're curious...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I just found a bunch of clovers growing by the
track over there!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...And?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
They look so nice! I feel like my runs have just
become three times as fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! You like flowers, right, Groove?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you come with me? We can look for
four-leaf clovers together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. Just focus on your training!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You know the kinds of speeds we can get up to.
You'll hurt yourself if you don't watch the track!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh... So you were acting so stern out of concern.
That's so sweet of you, Groove! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...No. I'm telling you to stop goofing around and
focus!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But it'd be a shame to not have fun, training
or not!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Don't you agree? I'm talking to you over there!
choice_data_list: Running with a friend is even more fun.
It's important to train and have fun!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right! Groove, mind taking a run with
me? ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you where the clovers are and race you
while we're at it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Only if you take it seriously. If you're not one
hundred percent in it, you'll lose.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll do anything as long as it's fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Aww... You sound just like Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's not "just like" me, it's exactly what I said. If
you don't take training seriously, you'll never win.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Let me see if you have enough guts to pass me!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: To pass you? You mean...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah, okay! You want to play tag!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You can be "it" first, so try and catch me! Here I
go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No, I just meant races in general...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever. As long as you're going to run
with everything you've got, I'll play along.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! I want to make each training session one
to remember!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Why don't I grab my camera? I bet I
could take some really dynamic shots!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll go get set up on the sidelines. ♪ I'll see you
around, Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wait, Fine! ...I can never keep up with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove looks completely exasperated as she
leaves the track, but she stays with Fine Motion
for a while as she photographs other trainees.
